SEARCH
Package qupath.ext.astra

Class AstraCellposeBuilder

java.lang.Object
qupath.ext.biop.cellpose.CellposeBuilder
qupath.ext.astra.AstraCellposeBuilder
public class AstraCellposeBuilder extends CellposeBuilder
Minimal ASTRA-owned builder surface required by the current training, tuning, and validation stacks. This builder preserves the fluent methods the ASTRA stacks call, resolves ASTRA-owned directories deterministically, and rejects runtime selectors that violate the single-runtime-path contract. Downstream Groovy stacks own MODEL_SOURCE / BASE_MODEL policy. By the time control reaches this builder, model selection has already been resolved to one explicit execution model reference: either a promoted model path or a shipped base-model name.

    • channels

      public AstraCellposeBuilder channels(String... channels)
      Description copied from class: CellposeBuilder
      Specify channels by name. Useful for detecting nuclei for one channel within a multichannel image, or potentially for trained models that support multichannel input.
      Overrides:
      channels in class CellposeBuilder
      Parameters:
      channels - 0-based indices of the channels to use
      Returns:
      this builder

      public AstraCellposeBuilder setOverlap(int overlap)
      Description copied from class: CellposeBuilder
      Set the overlap (in pixels) between tiles. This overlap should be larger than 2x the largest object you are trying to segment
      Overrides:

    • nThreads

      public AstraCellposeBuilder nThreads(int nThreads)
      Description copied from class: CellposeBuilder
      Specify the number of threads to use for processing. If you encounter problems, setting this to 1 may help to resolve them by preventing multithreading.
      Overrides:
      nThreads in class CellposeBuilder

      nThreads - the number of threads to use

    • readResultsAsynchronously

      public AstraCellposeBuilder readResultsAsynchronously()
      Description copied from class: CellposeBuilder
      Use an asynchronous method to read the results from the cellpose as it writes files Can result in faster processing. !!EXPERIMENTAL!!
      Overrides:
      readResultsAsynchronously in class CellposeBuilder

    • pixelSize

      public AstraCellposeBuilder pixelSize(double pixelSize)
      Description copied from class: CellposeBuilder
      Resolution at which the cell detection should be run. The units depend upon the PixelCalibration of the input image.

      The default is to use the full resolution of the input image.

      For an image calibrated in microns, the recommended default is approximately 0.5.

      Overrides:
      pixelSize in class CellposeBuilder
      Parameters:
      pixelSize - Pixel size in microns for the analysis
      Returns:
      this builder

    • constrainToParent

      public AstraCellposeBuilder constrainToParent(boolean constrainToParent)
      Description copied from class: CellposeBuilder
      If true, display all and entirely the cells intersecting the parent annotation, with a padding. Default is true, with padding of 15um
      Overrides:
      constrainToParent in class CellposeBuilder
      Parameters:
      constrainToParent -
      Returns:
      this builder

    • diameter

      public AstraCellposeBuilder diameter(Double diameter)
      Description copied from class: CellposeBuilder
      The estimated diameter of the objects to detect. Cellpose will further downsample (or upsample) the images in order to match the diamteter corresponding to the model being used
      Overrides:
      diameter in class CellposeBuilder
      Parameters:
      diameter - in pixels
      Returns:
      this builder

      Description copied from class: CellposeBuilder
      /** cellprob threshold, default is 0, decrease to find more and larger masks
      Overrides:

    • flowThreshold

      public AstraCellposeBuilder flowThreshold(Double threshold)
      Description copied from class: CellposeBuilder
      Flow error threshold, 0 turns off this optional QC step. Default: 0.
      Overrides:
      flowThreshold in class CellposeBuilder
      Parameters:
      threshold - flow threshold (default 0.0)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • simplify

      public AstraCellposeBuilder simplify(double distance)
      Description copied from class: CellposeBuilder
      Customize the extent to which contours are simplified. Simplification reduces the number of vertices, which in turn can reduce memory requirements and improve performance.

      Implementation note: this currently uses the Visvalingam-Whyatt algorithm.

      Overrides:
      simplify in class CellposeBuilder
      Parameters:
      distance - simplify distance threshold; set ≤ 0 to turn off additional simplification
      Returns:
      this builder

    • normalizePercentiles

      public AstraCellposeBuilder normalizePercentiles(double min, double max)
      Description copied from class: CellposeBuilder
      Apply percentile normalization separately to the input image channels.

      Note that this can be used in combination with CellposeBuilder.preprocess(ImageOp...), in which case the order in which the operations are applied depends upon the order in which the methods of the builder are called.

      Warning! This is applied on a per-tile basis. This can result in artifacts and false detections without background/constant regions. Consider using CellposeBuilder.inputAdd(double...) and CellposeBuilder.inputScale(double...) as alternative normalization strategies, if appropriate constants can be determined to apply globally.

      Overrides:
      normalizePercentiles in class CellposeBuilder
      Parameters:
      min - minimum percentile
      max - maximum percentile
      Returns:
      this builder
      See Also:
      • CellposeBuilder.normalizePercentiles(double, double, boolean, double)
